THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1880 PINE LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHUKOV, ARTHUR MICHAEL DEFENDANT ARTHUR MICHAEL ZHUKOV IS ENJOINED AND RESTRAINED FROM ENTERING INTO, OR ONTO THE APARTMENT BUILDING LOCATED AT 1880 PINE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA FOR THREE [3] YEARS, BEGINNING THIS DAY OF NOVEMBER 2, 2017 AND ENDING NOVEMBER 1, 2020. ADDITIONALLY, DEFENDANT ARTHUR MICHAEL ZHUKOV IS ENJOINED AND RESTRAINED FROM BEING WITHIN 25 YARDS FROM THE APARTMENT BUILDING LOCATED 1880 PINE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA FOR [3] YEARS, BEGINNING THIS DAY OF NOVEMBER 2, 2017 AND ENDING NOVEMBER 1, 2020

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2018 Off Calendar

Declaration Of Michael Johnson In Support Of Plaintiff Request For Court Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing on plaintiff's request for injunctive relief to abate a nuisance caused by the conduct and activities of defendant Arthur Michael Zhukov.
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR 6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Francisco G. Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 1880 Pine, L.P.
Michael Johnston, Property Manager for plaintiff 1880 Pine, L.P. was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defaulted defendant Arthur Michael Zhukov.
Default was entered against defendant on July 10, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff 1880 Pine, L.P., and against the Defaulted Defendant Arthur Michael Zhukov, as follows:

Defendant Arthur Michael Zhukov is enjoined and restrained from entering into, or onto the apartment building located at 1880 Pine Street, San Francisco, CA for three [3] years, beginning this day of November 2, 2017 and ending November 1, 2020. Additionally, defendant Arthur Michael Zhukov is enjoined and restrained from being within 25 yards from the apartment building located 1880 Pine Street, San Francisco, CA for [3] years, beginning this day of November 2, 2017 and ending November 1, 2020.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2017 Continued To Feb-14-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
